items: Kody Clemens homered 2 times in Kansas City's 8-6 win over Minnesota.
Jackson Chourio homered 2 times, driving in 4 in San Francisco's 12-9 win over Milwaukee.
Shea Langeliers homered 2 times, driving in 3 in Chicago Cubs's 7-6 win over The Athletics.
The Yankees walked off Cleveland, 2-1 — one of 3 one-run finishes across the league.
